text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Gagh, dang! I forgot all about our<n>homework!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Oh my, is everything all right?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: This is it... It's do or die! Grass, I need a<n>favor—

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: You know I can't let you copy my<n>homework, El...

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
There's no point to homework if you<n>don't do it
yourself...

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
I'm sure you can do it if you try. I'll be<n>cheering
you on!
